narrative:
Wilmington 3-A (precinct in Clinton County) has 692 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
